notes: Trial matrix is built from REAL WF runs of distinct hyperparameter variants (build_trial_cache.py).  The realised strategy is appended as the last column and corresponds to the production HP / Optuna-selected configuration.  CSCV enumerates ALL comb(S, S/2) splits exhaustively (12,870 for S=16).  PBO < 0.5 means the IS-selection process beats coin-flip; < 0.2 = informative.
